nasb.text: Then three years later I went up to Jerusalem to become acquainted with Cephas, and stayed with him fifteen days.

esv.text: Then after three years I went up to Jerusalem to visit Cephas and remained with him fifteen days.

cnv.text: 過了三年，我才上耶路撒冷去見磯法，和他住了十五天。

ccb.text: 过了三年，我才到耶路撒冷去拜会彼得，和他一起住了十五天。

csbs.text: 三年以后，我才上耶路撒冷去见矶法，在他那里住了十五天。
